name: Legends Of Runeterra Conversion: Beyond the Bandlewood

cards.rules_text:
Trample, Fated [i](The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.)[/i]
Pantheon enters with a shield counter.
Each time a source you control targets a creature you control, put a Atreus counter on Pantheon. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Pantheon has five or more Atreus counters, remove all Atreus counters from Pantheon, then transform him.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Trample, Fated [i](The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.)[/i]
Whenever a source you control targets a creature you control, choose one that Pantheon doesn't have from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, and vigilance. Pantheon gets the chosen ability.

cards.rules_text: Two target creatures you control get +1/+2 until end of turn.

When Camphor enters, if four or more creatures you control have been targeted by sources you control this turn, Camphor gets Trample, Challenger, and a spellshield counter. [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature. The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Fated [i](The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.)[/i]
Fury, Fated [i](When this creature destroys another creature, put a +1/+1 counter on it. The first time each turn this creature is targeted by a source you control, it gets a +1/+1 counter.)[/i]

Target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter.
Target creature an opponent controls gets a stun counter.
Two target creatures you control get two +1/+1 counters.
When Blinded Mystic enters, up to one target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter and up to one target creature an opponent controls loses all abilities.

Focus [i](This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.)[/i]
This spell can only be cast if an opponent has more creatures then you.
Target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter for each creature target opponent controls.
Whenever Freed Colossus enters or attacks, create a Gem token.

When Iula enters, choose one —
• Target creature you control gets Trample.
• Target creature you control gets a spellshield counter. [i](The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)[/i]
Tap two target creatures, then put a stun counter on them.

Trample
Whenever a landmark you control is destroyed or sacrificed, Waste Walker gets a +1/+1 counter.

Vanishing 3
When Obelisk of Power enters or is destroyed or sacrificed, the creature with the highest power among creatures you control gets +2/+0.

Choose one —
• Target creature you control gets +2/+1 until the start of your next turn.
• Destroy target landmark you control. Target creature you control gets +4/+2 until the start of your next turn.

As an additional cost to cast this card sacrifice a landmark or untapped land you control.
Rite of the Arcane deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.
Whenever Endless Devout is destroyed, if it would be put into your graveyard, transform it instead.

Vanishing 3

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
Whenever Sandseer enters, draw a card. If the card drawn this way is a landmark, reveal it and repeat this process.

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
When Ruinous Acolyte enters, you may sacrifice a landmark you control to give each creature you control named Ruinous Acolyte a +1/+1 counter.
When Herald of the Magus enters, if there are four or more landmarks in your graveyard, it gets the ability “Legendary creatures you control have +2/+2 and Trample.”
Exile all nonland permanents that entered your graveyard this turn. At the beginning of your next upkeep, put each permanent exiled this way onto the battlefield under your control.

Choose one —
• Create a Ruinous Acolyte token.
• Create an Obelisk of Power token.
Target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0. Then target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls fight. [i](Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)[/i]

cards.type: Legendary Artifact Creature — Construct Wizard Demigod
cards.rules_text:
[i]Rite of the Arcane[/i] — Whenever you or a source you control destroys or sacrifices a landmark you control, Xerath deals 1 damage to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control.
Whenever a landmark you control is destroyed or sacrificed, put an Arcane counter on Xerath. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Xerath has four or more Arcane counters, remote all arcane counters from Xerath, then transform him.
Partner
cards.type2: Legendary Artifact Creature — Construct Wizard Demigod
cards.rules_text2:
[i]Rite of the Arcane[/i] — Whenever you or a source you control destroys or sacrifices a landmark you control, Xerath deals 3 damage to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control. If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, this ability deals 5 damage instead.
[i]Ascended God-Warrior[/i] — If you control an enchantment card named Restored Sun Disk, at the beginning of your upkeep, Xerath deals 5 damage to the creature with the lowest power among creatures opponents control, and Xerath has “Whenever a creature an opponent controls would enter the graveyard, it is exiled instead.”

cards.rules_text: Piercing Darkness deals 5 damage to target creature, you gain that much life.
The first time each turn an instant or sorcery you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, Watcher on the Isles deals 2 damage to that creatures controller.

Lifelink
When Ixtali Sentinel enters, create a Darkness token if you don't have one. Until the end of turn, the next time you activate the ability of a Darkness you control targeting a creature an opponent controls, copy it targeting that creatures controller.

When Dess and Ada enters, create a Darkness token if you don't have one except it has “{0}: Sacrifice Darkness. Darkness deals 2 to each creature target opponent controls. Activate only as a sorcery.”

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
The first time an instant, sorcery, or activated ability you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, Burgeoning Sentinel gets +2/+1.
When Solari Sentinel enters, create a Darkness token if you don't have one.

The first time each turn an instant or sorcery you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, create a Mistwraith token except it has Ephemeral. [i](This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)[/i]
At the beginning of your upkeep, create an exiled copy of an instant or sorcery from your graveyard that was cast on your last turn. Until the end of turn, you may cast that copy from exile.

Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
The first time an instant, sorcery, or activated ability you control destroys a creature an opponent controls, Buhru Sentinel gets +2/+1.
Destroy target creature. Until the end of turn, creatures opponents control have -2/-0.
Each player draws 2 cards.
When Officer Squad enters, target player reveals their hand, then discards the card with the lowest mana value from among them to draw 3 cards.

When Station Archivist enters, reveal the top five cards of your library, then choose up to one instant or sorcery from among them and create an exiled copy of it. Shuffle all cards revealed this way into your library. Until the end of the turn, you may cast the copy from exile.
Shuffle target creature into their owners library, then that creatures owner draws a card.
Sump Fumes deals 2 damage to target creature. If you've drawn two or more cards this turn, Sump Fumes deals 3 damage instead.
Target player reveals their hand, then discards the card with the lowest mana value from among them to draw 3 cards.
Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. If you have drawn two or more cards this turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and shadow until end of turn instead.

When The Forge Of Tomorrow enters, create a Forge Worker token.
The first time you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, sacrifice The Forge Of Tomorrow and untap all lands you control.

When Ferros Financier enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery with mana value 6 or greater, put that card into your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.
Whenever Forge Chief deals combat damage, untap target land you control.
Create two Forge Worker tokens.
Shock Blast deals 3 damage to any target, then deals 3 damage to any other target.

Flying
The first time you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, Ferros Skycruiser gets +2/+0.
The first time you cast a spell with mana value 6 or greater, Hextech Handler gets “Artifact creatures you control get +1/+0.”

At the beginning of your pre-combat main phase, reveal the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery with mana value 6 or greater, create an exiled copy of it. Shuffle all cards revealed this way into your library. Until the end of turn, you may sacrifice Hextech Anomaly to cast that copy from exile without paying its mana cost.

First strike
When Albus Ferros enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Jayce Talis, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.
Whenever Albus Ferros attacks, Albus Ferros deals X+3 damage to target opponent, where X equals the number of spells you have cast this turn with mana value 6 or greater.

When Stinky Whump enters, create two Puffcap tokens.
Whenever a source an opponent controls destroys Stinky Whump, that opponent creates two Stinky Whump tokens.
Rocket Barrage deals 4 damage to target creature, then deals 1 damage to each other creature that creatures controller controls.

When this token is sacrificed, Flashbomb deals 1 damage to a random creature you control. [i](Choose a random target for each token sacrificed.)[/i]
[i](If you would draw a card while you control one or more Flashbomb tokens, flip a coin. If you win the flip, draw the card. If you lose the flip, reveal the card as you draw it, then sacrifice Flashbomb tokens equal to its mana value.)[/i]

First strike
Whenever Caitlyn deals combat damage, target opponent creates two Flashbomb tokens.
At the end of any phase on your turn, if an opponent has five or more Flashbomb tokens, transform Caitlyn.
